title: Founding Brand & Growth (Growth Generalist)
key_evidence: Listing explicitly: 'We don't care if you have previous B2B marketing experience' and 'Your seniority does not matter, what matters is ambition, craft, and the ability to turn ideas into high-quality output fast' — removes Ryan's biggest structural blockers (no SWE, no enterprise B2B, mid-level band).

Wants a generalist who has 'built things before (processes, products, companies, side-hustles, communities, events, brands)' — Ryan's first-employee/founder-associate + community + brand-from-zero history maps almost word-for-word.

Funding: $50M+ Series A (closed ~early 2026), plus earlier £9m round Sep 2025 (UKTN). Founded 2024, ~30 people, ex-Palantir founders, London-HQ. Small talent-dense team = founder/hiring-manager reads CVs.

Posting published 2026-04-27 — ~6 weeks open as of run date. Moderately aged; some accumulated applicants but not viral. Conduct is enterprise-SAP-AI, lower consumer hype than a frontier lab = manageable competition.
Visa sponsorship offered ('we sponsor visas from everywhere') — irrelevant positive for Ryan (UK-authorized) but signals low ATS-gatekeeping.
Domain is enterprise SAP/ERP AI — NOT Ryan's crypto/Web3 home turf, but role is brand/growth craft not domain delivery, so domain gap is low-risk here.
biggest_lever: Role explicitly de-prioritises seniority and prior B2B experience and prizes the exact profile Ryan has — a creative operator who has built brands/communities/companies from zero; this is a founding marketing hire read by founders, not an ATS.
biggest_risk: It is the single 'most consequential first marketing hire' so the bar on creative taste and portfolio-of-built-things is very high; Ryan must demonstrate sharp brand/creative output (not just growth metrics), and 6-weeks-open means a strong shortlist may already exist.
apply_verdict: Prioritise — top-tier fit. Founding growth role that actively wants Ryan's exact non-traditional builder profile, founder-read screening, well-funded London team. Apply fast with a creative-led, show-don't-tell application.
